channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Tickets now on sale for San Diego's 2025 Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: This will be San Diego's 73rd year hosting a PGA Tour event and the 58th time it's being held at Torrey Pines Golf Course.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Pulisic scores direct from corner kick to set AC Milan on way to Champions League win
item.description: MILAN (AP) — Christian Pulisic scored direct from a corner kick to set AC Milan on the way to its first victory in this season's Champions League. Pulisic surprised everyone when he curled in a kick from the left corner flag in the 34th minute to put Milan 1-0 up against Club Brugge on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Finishing strong: Palo Alto’s resilient Sophie Pan has overcome sprained ankles, a broken finger and more
item.description: Palo Alto's senior volleyball standout Sophie Pan missed 22 matches this season, the latest in a long line of setbacks for the determined college-bound middle blocker.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Atletico trying to raise awareness of fans with disabilities in Champions League game
item.description: Atletico Madrid is trying to bring a record number of spectators with disabilities to a Champions League match to raise awareness about inclusion and the need to promote better access to sport for disabled fans in venues across Europe.
item.dc:creator: Tales Azzoni, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: BYU staying humble and hungry during winning streak
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It was a drive that will go down in school history. The 4th-and-8 conversion to Chase Roberts. The Jake Retzlaff 27-yard scramble. And then the 35-yard strike to Darius Lassiter with 10 seconds left to beat Oklahoma State, 38-35.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Nestor Cortes likely to rejoin Yankees pitching staff for World Series
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Nestor Cortes appears likely to rejoin the New York Yankees pitching staff for the World Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers. The 29-year-old left-hander hasn’t pitched in a game since Sept. 18 because of a flexor strain in his pitching elbow.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yankees and Dodgers meet in World Series for 12th time in matchup of Broadway and Hollywood
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Broadway vs. Hollywood. Subway vs. Freeway. Judge vs. Ohtani. New York neighbors who became cross-country rivals, the Yankees and Dodgers renew their starry struggle in the World Series for the first time in 43 years.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Duke's Cooper Flagg makes preseason AP All-America team as ACC, Big 12, SEC each place 2 players
item.description: Alabama's Mark Sears and North Carolina's RJ Davis looked into the possibility of leaving for the NBA before deciding to return for another college season. Their decisions helped their teams earn top-10 rankings in the AP Top 25 and earned both players some preseason honors, too.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers finish off Mets with 10-5 win in NLCS and advance to face Yankees in World Series
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani carried the injury-riddled Los Angeles Dodgers to baseball's best record during the regular season. Tommy Edman joined the team in late July and helped them reach the World Series. It's been that kind of year for the big-spending Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC defeats Boston in overtime, 2-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is showing a penchant for overtime in its first NHL season. Michael Kesserling scored at 2:46 of overtime to give the Utah Hockey Club a 2-1 victory over the Boston Bruins on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: SDSU'S Sack Master Trey White
item.description: Sacks are such an unpredictable stat in the game of Football. You can be absolutely unlockable as a defender, but if the quarterback gets the ball out of his hands before you arrive, it's all for not in the stat column.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks fall in Calgary to end season-opening road trip, host Sharks in home opener Thursday
item.description: CALGARY, Alberta (AP) — The Blackhawks will finally play on their home ice after a four-game Western Conference road trip to open the 2024-25 season. It was a trip with mixed results.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Cam Rising's legacy marred by injuries
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cam Rising will go down as one of the most successful quarterbacks in Utah history. Rising won 20 games over parts of three seasons, threw for 6,127 yards, 53 touchdowns, and led the Utes to back-to-back Pac-12 Championships and Rose Bowl appearances.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tom Brady's purchase of a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders is approved by NFL team owners
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Tom Brady has another new role in the NFL: owner. The seven-time Super Bowl champion purchased a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders, a deal unanimously approved by NFL team owners on Tuesday at the league's annual fall meeting.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation
